content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.claude_teams.team_coordinator
FILE: cosmos/integration/claude_teams/team_coordinator.py (645 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: TEAM COORDINATOR - Coordinate Claude Teams with Cosmos Swarm
=================================================================

Bridges Claude Agent Teams with Cosmos's existing swarm architecture.
Enables hybrid deliberation between Cosmos agents and Claude teams.

Key Features:
- Spawn Claude team

CLASSES:
- TeamRole(Enum): Roles within a Claude team.
- TaskPriority(Enum): Task priority levels.
- TeamTask: A task for a Claude team.
- TeamMessage: Inter-team message for coordination.
- ClaudeTeam: A Claude agent team configuration.
- TeamCoordinator: Coordinates Claude agent teams with Cosmos's swarm.

Acts as a bridge between:
-
  Methods: async def create_team(self, name: str, purpose: str, roles: Optional[List[TeamRole]]=None, model: Cl
  Methods: async def disband_team(self, team_id: str) -> None
  Methods: async def create_task(self, description: str, priority: TaskPriority=TaskPriority.MEDIUM, assign_to:
  Methods: async def assign_task(self, task_id: str, team_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def execute_task(self, task_id: str, timeout: float=300.0) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def send_message(self, from_team: str, to_team: str, content: str, message_type: str='info') -
  Methods: async def broadcast(self, from_team: str, content: str) -> List[TeamMessage]
  Methods: def get_messages(self, team_id: str, unread_only: bool=False) -> List[TeamMessage]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_team_coordinator() -> TeamCoordinator
